message:
Fix from_mysql live tracking watermark typing

Resolve explicit tracking_column via information_schema so

validation is always enforced in live mode.

Track watermark type and empty-state explicitly to support

signed and unsigned tracking columns without data loss.

Add fixtures and integration tests for signed live streaming

and invalid explicit tracking_column diagnostics.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+from_mysql table="users",
+           live=true,
+           tracking_column="name",
+           host=env("MYSQL_HOST"),
+           port=int(env("MYSQL_PORT")),
+           user=env("MYSQL_USER"),
+           password=env("MYSQL_PASSWORD"),
+           database=env("MYSQL_DATABASE")

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+error: `tracking_column` `name` does not exist in `users` or is not an integer column
+ --> tests/operators/from_mysql/live_non_integer_tracking_column_error.tql:3:28
+  |
+3 |            tracking_column="name",
+  |                            ^^^^^^ 
+  |

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+from_mysql table=env("MYSQL_LIVE_SIGNED_STREAM_TABLE"),
+           live=true,
+           tracking_column="id",
+           host=env("MYSQL_HOST"),
+           port=int(env("MYSQL_PORT")),
+           user=env("MYSQL_USER"),
+           password=env("MYSQL_PASSWORD"),
+           database=env("MYSQL_DATABASE")
+head 3
